title: Agar Plates
steps: Fill the container with 900 mL MQ water.
Add in order while stirring on a heated stir plate: 10 g Peptone 10 g NaCl 5 g Yeast Extract 15 g Agar Stir until solids are dissolved.
Bring total volume up to 1 L.
Aliquot media into 5, 200 mL volumes in different Erlenmeyer flasks.
Attach lid and cover with aluminum. Place a piece of autoclave tape on the container.
Autoclave on liquid cycle for 45 minutes.
If necessary, add antibiotic. Amp: 1 μL/mL
Pour plates using aseptic technique. This step should be done near a burning flame. The flame may be used to disrupt any bubbles that may appear.
creator: Payam Amiri
